std::vector<OrderView> query_high_value_orders() {

    .from<Order>("o")
    .inner_join<Customer>("c")
    .on("o.customer_id = c.customer_id")
    .where("o.total_amount > ?", 1000)
    .order_by("o.total_amount DESC");
    
  return query.execute();
}
```

std::vector<OrderView> query_high_value_orders() {
  // Open database connection
  auto db = sqlgen::sqlite::Database("test_db.sqlite");

  auto results = db.query<OrderView>()
    .select(Order::order_id, Customer::name, Order::total_amount, Order::order_date)
    .from<Order>()
    .join<Customer>()
    .on(Order::customer_id == Customer::customer_id)
    .where(Order::total_amount > 1000)
    .order_by(Order::total_amount, sqlgen::desc)
    .execute();
    
  return results;
}
```
